title: Ability to show integration templates from a view feature
excerpt:
Hi Team, 
Can we please add the feature to show integration templates belonging to an app from user action (button press) in an item view or board view. Sometimes when app has multiple features like integration templates…

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

Can we please add the feature to show integration templates belonging to an app from user action (button press) in an item view or board view. Sometimes when app has multiple features like integration templates or board view, many new users are not able to fully understand how to use the app after they have seen the first onboarding feature. Having the ability to show integration templates from board, will help in giving users first some instructions in board view, then taking them to integration templates directly to configure them.

Thanks
Yash Garg

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for sharing the request @YashGarg !!

posts.author: peken (Petar Kenic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having an api endpoint to fetch a URL to a monday.com integration template or specific recipe would be extremely useful. At Adaptavist we would like to be able to link users from our Slack App to built-in recipes and/or our integration template page.

Currently we have no way of redirecting users to it.

posts.author: Alastair (Alastair Wilkinson)
posts.cookedHtml: The discoverability of app related templates is horrible in the automations area. Adding a way to link to both a specific recipe and to your templates landing screen would be great.
